news.headline: Global automotive engine oil market to grow by USD 12.5 billion (4% CAGR) from 2025-2029 due to rising vehicle usage and AI impact.
news.summary: A recent report explores the impact of AI on the market, focusing on the global automotive engine oil sector. It is projected that the market will witness a significant growth of approximately USD 12.5 billion between 2025 and 2029, with a calculated compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4% during the forecast period. This indicates a significant shift in the market landscape due to advancements in AI technology.

news.headline: Governor requires investigation into why hydrants were dry during LA wildfires.
Dow Jones dropped 700 points on strong jobs report, while Delta Air Lines reached a record high.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced significant declines in the stock market, dropping by 700 points following a strong jobs report. Additionally, Delta Air Lines achieved a new all-time high, reflecting positive performance in the airline sector despite the overall market downturn. This information was live covered by Investor's Business Daily, highlighting the contrasting trajectories of the major indexes and specific stock movements.

news.headline: Stock market breaks support despite new buy signals; Nvidia leads bearish action, Meta and other stocks show buy signals. Tesla maintains key level.
news.summary: Despite some buy signals from Meta and a few other stocks, the overall market witnessed a bearish trend led by Nvidia. Tesla maintained a crucial level, while the stock market broke support levels. Investors need to pay attention to these developments and consider their next steps carefully. These recent market movements were discussed in a recent article by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: 77% prefer self-checkout for faster service, according to NCR Voyix survey. Key findings from 2025 Commerce Experience Report.
news.summary: NCR Voyix Corporation, a prominent digital commerce solutions provider, recently unveiled findings from its 2025 Commerce Experience Report. This annual U.S. consumer survey delves into evolving purchase behaviors in grocery, fuel convenience, and dining sectors. The primary reason consumers opt for self-checkout is speed, with 77% expressing a preference for it. NCR Voyix Corporation is listed on the NYSE as VYX, indicating its significance in the industry.

news.headline: CrytocoinMiner offers accessible cloud mining for popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Litecoin. Features include enhanced security, high profitability, no hidden fees, and 24/7 support.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency mining has become a popular way to generate passive income, but the complexity and costs involved have deterred many. CrytocoinMiner, a leading cloud mining platform, is changing the game by offering a user-friendly and profitable solution for mining popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Litecoin. Features of CrytocoinMiner include advanced technology, enhanced security powered by McAfee® and Cloudflare®, daily payouts, no hidden fees, 24/7 support, and the ability to mine over 9 different currencies. This platform allows users to start earning profits without the need for expensive hardware or technical expertise, making cryptocurrency mining accessible to beginners and experienced investors alike.

news.headline: Boot Barn Holdings, Inc. released preliminary third quarter results for FY2025 and appointed a new Chief Digital Officer. They will be participating in the 2025 ICR Conference. Visit investor.bootbarn.com for details.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, Boot Barn Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BOOT) disclosed their preliminary results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025, concluding on December 28, 2024. This announcement preceded their involvement in the ICR Conference on January 13, 2025. For detailed financial insights, a Supplemental Financial Presentation can be accessed at investor.bootbarn.com. Regarding the third quarter, the Company anticipates significant developments. The quarter closed on December 28, 2024, showcasing promising outcomes.

news.headline: Cabot Corp declares $0.43/share quarterly dividend for stockholders, payable on March 14, 2025; headquartered in Boston.
news.summary: In Boston, on January 10, 2025, Cabot Corporation (NYSE: CBT) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.43 per share for all outstanding common stock shares. This dividend will be paid on March 14, 2025, to shareholders as of the record date of February 28, 2025. Cabot Corporation, based in Boston, Massachusetts, is a global company specializing in chemicals and performance materials.

news.headline: CEO Chris Weiler is retiring from KLDiscovery; interim CEO is Chairman Mike Suchsland.
news.summary: KLDiscovery Inc., a top provider of electronic discovery and data recovery solutions globally, has revealed the retirement of CEO and co-founder Chris Weiler. As part of the transition, the Chairman of the Board, Mike Suchsland, will oversee operations along with a Leadership Committee. This announcement comes as KLDiscovery continues its prominent position in the industry, offering cutting-edge technology solutions.

news.headline: Interfor sells Québec operations to Les Chantiers de Chibougamau Ltée, including sawmills and a plant.
news.summary: In Burnaby, British Columbia, on January 10, 2025, Interfor Corporation announced the successful completion of the sale of its operations in Québec, Canada to Les Chantiers de Chibougamau Ltée. This divestiture includes the sawmills located in Val-d’Or and Matagami, along with the Sullivan remanufacturing plant in Val-d’Or. The transaction, involving key assets in Québec, signifies a strategic move for Interfor.

news.headline: Lumine Group changes directors - Robin van Poelje resigns, Laurie Schultz appointed to Board on Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Lumine Group Inc. revealed that Robin van Poelje has stepped down from the Board of Directors, and Laurie Schultz has been appointed as the new member. Lumine Group, listed as LMN on TSXV, made this announcement.

news.headline: Dunxin Financial Holdings changes name to Eason Technology Limited on Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Hong Kong-based Dunxin Financial Holdings, known as DXF and traded under OTC Pink as DXFFY and DXFFD, revealed its name change to "Eason Technology Limited." The adjustment includes the alteration of the company's Chinese dual foreign name.

news.headline: Enbridge Inc. will discuss Q4 2024 results on Feb. 14 at 7 a.m. MT (9 a.m. ET) through webcast.
news.summary: Enbridge Inc. (TSX: ENB) (NYSE: ENB) based in Calgary, AB, will be conducting a conference call and webcast to discuss their 2024 fourth quarter results on February 14, 2025, at 7 a.m. MT (9 a.m. ET). This update will be available to investors and the public for review.

news.headline: Energizer Holdings, Inc. will report Q1 FY2025 results on Feb. 4 and discuss them in webcast at 10 am.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Energizer Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ENR) announced that it will be releasing its financial results for the First Quarter of Fiscal Year 2025 on February 4. The company will share its performance before the market opens and will conduct an investor conference call with a webcast starting at 10 a.m.

news.headline: Xilio Therapeutics grants 375,000 shares to new Chief Legal Officer under Inducement Stock Incentive Plan.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Xilio Therapeutics, Inc. based in Waltham, Massachusetts, revealed that they have awarded a non-qualified stock option to acquire 375,000 shares of common stock to Caroline Hensley, their recently appointed Chief Legal Officer. This option was granted under Xilio Therapeutics’ 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan and became effective from January 1, 2025. Xilio Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing tumor-activated immuno-oncology therapies for individuals battling cancer. The stock option was disclosed without specifying the monetary value attached to it.

news.headline: Photronics, Inc. (Nasdaq: PLAB) appoints George Macricostas as Executive Chairman on Jan. 6, 2025.
news.summary: Photronics, Inc., a global frontrunner in photomask technologies and solutions, based in Brookfield, Connecticut, revealed the appointment of George Macricostas as Executive Chairman on January 6, 2025. The company is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol PLAB.

news.headline: Rockridge Resources gets final approval for merger with Eros Resources and MAS Gold in a three-way transaction.
news.summary: Rockridge Resources Ltd. has received final court orders approving the proposed statutory plans of arrangement under section 288 of the Business Corporations Act in British Columbia. This arrangement involves Eros acquiring all issued and outstanding common shares of MAS Gold and Rockridge. Eros will exchange common shares for the shares it doesn't already own in the companies, as outlined in a Joint Management Information Circular dated November 26, 2024. The transaction is part of a three-way merger deal and is in accordance with a Business Combination Agreement dated September 30, 2024. The documents related to the transaction are available on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca.

news.headline: Aimfinity Investment Corp. I Extends Deadline for Business Combination after Extraordinary General Meeting on Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: Wilmington, DE - Jan. 10, 2025 - Aimfinity Investment Corp. I (NASDAQ: AIMAU), a blank check company registered as a Cayman Islands exempted firm, reported the completion of an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders on January 9, 2025. The meeting, initially deferred from December 30, 2024, saw significant participation. The company made this announcement without specifying the exact figures involved.

news.headline: Axogen appoints Craig Swandal as new VP of Operations. Inducement grant under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) given.
news.summary: Medical device manufacturing veteran Craig Swandal has been appointed to the leadership team. With extensive experience in the field, Swandal brings a wealth of knowledge to the team.

news.headline: First Horizon surprises four families on "Extreme Makeover: Home Edition", providing crucial resources.MEMPHIS, Tenn., Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: A bank headquartered in Memphis is offering essential support to enhance the well-being of families. On January 10, 2025, First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN) along with its banking subsidiary, First Horizon Bank, located in Memphis, Tennessee, announced their involvement in the much-awaited revival of a show on ABC.

IMF Chief Georgieva: World Growth to Remain Stable with Continued Disinflation in 2025

Bitcoin proposal submitted to Meta for corporate treasury with verifiable fixed supply, most inflation-resistant store of value.
news.summary: The proposal highlighted that Bitcoin's verifiable fixed supply makes it the most resistant to inflation among all stores of value.

news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia on January 10, 2025, major industry associations including NATSO, representing truck stops and travel plazas, SIGMA: America's Leading Fuel Marketers, the National Association of Convenience Stores (NACS), American Trucking Associations (ATA), and the Truckload Carriers Association (TCA) came together to voice their views.

Jeffrey Bailly and CFO Ron Lataille are set to take part in the virtual CJS Securities 25th Annual “New Ideas for the New Year” Conference on January 14, 2025. The event will commence at 8:45 AM ET.

This launch is accompanied by the unveiling of...

news.headline: M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) declares quarterly preferred stock dividends: $0.3515625 per share on Perpetual Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative.
news.summary: Buffalo-based M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE: MTB) released news on Jan. 10, 2025, declaring the quarterly cash dividends for specific series of perpetual preferred stock. The dividends announced include $0.3515625 per share for the Perpetual Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative stock.

news.headline: Bitcoin Act could lead to 'profound' adoption impact as industry execs predict BTC price surpassing $1 million per coin.
news.summary: According to industry executives, the approval of the Bitcoin Act may result in the price of BTC surpassing $1 million per coin in the future.

news.headline: GrafTech partners with shareholder Nilesh Undavia; he holds 6.7% share. Sachin Shivaram joins Board.
news.summary: In Brooklyn Heights, Ohio, GrafTech International Ltd. (NYSE: EAF) disclosed a newly formed cooperation agreement with one of its major shareholders, Mr. Nilesh Undavia, who possesses around 6.7% of the company's common stock. This agreement has resulted in the appointment of Sachin Shivaram to the Company's Board of Directors. Sachin Shivaram will assume this position promptly as per the terms outlined in the Cooperation Agreement.

news.headline: Stock market major indexes close significantly down today.
NASA selects 15 innovative ideas for NIAC program in 2025 to transform future missions; includes projects from across US.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, NASA announced the selection of 15 groundbreaking proposals for its NIAC (NASA Innovative Advanced Concepts) program. The chosen ideas, carefully curated from various companies and institutions nationwide, aim to revolutionize future space missions for the advancement of humanity. This year's Phase of the program will focus on developing these visionary concepts to shape the future of space exploration.

news.headline: Check out the latest update on the US restaurant job market from Bloomberg.
US restaurant industry faces staffing crisis with over 2 million jobs going unfilled due to labor shortage.
US labor market surpasses expectations with 256,000 nonfarm payrolls in December, unemployment rate at 4.1%. Wall Street erases post-election gains amid interest rate concerns.
news.summary: This week, Wall Street erased its post-election gains as concerns over rising interest rates intensified due to a strong labor market, high inflation expectations, and growing geopolitical tensions in anticipation of Donald Trump's return to the White House. The trading week was shortened due to the funeral of former President Jimmy Carter, but market activity peaked on Friday. The U.S. economy added an impressive 256,000 nonfarm payrolls in December, surpassing economists' projection of 160,000 jobs and marking the strongest job growth since March. The unemployment rate also fell to 4.1%, lower than the expected 4.2%. In 2024, the U.S. labor market ended the year with exceptional performance.

news.headline: Accolade (NASDAQ:ACCD) reports Q3 earnings with EPS of $-0.3, missing estimates by -87.0%.
news.summary: Accolade (NASDAQ:ACCD) announced its Q3 earnings on January 10, 2025, at 09:30 AM. The company fell short of estimated earnings by -87.0%, with an EPS of $-0.3 compared to the expected figure. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Lexaria Bioscience (NASDAQ: LEXX) Q1 earnings report shows missed estimated earnings by -33.0%, EPS $-0.16.
news.summary: Lexaria Bioscience (NASDAQ:LEXX) released its Q1 earnings on Friday, January 10, 2025 at 02:19 PM. The company reported an EPS of $-0.16, falling short of estimated earnings by -33.0%. For more details, the complete news article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Freight Technologies (Nasdaq: FRGT) changes auditor from Marcum LLP to TAAD LLP due to  undisclosed reasons.
news.summary: Houston-based company Fr8Tech, listed as FRGT on Nasdaq, revealed on Jan. 10, 2025, that they have switched their auditing firm from Marcum LLP to TAAD LLP. Fr8Tech, a leader in logistics management innovation, provides tech solutions for supply chain issues. The change is effective immediately.

news.headline: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE: MTD) will share Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 6, 2025, and host a conference call the next morning at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Visit investor.mt.com for the live webcast.
news.summary: COLUMBUS, Ohio-- Mettler-Toledo International Inc. revealed that it is scheduled to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 post-market closure on Thursday, February 6, 2025. Subsequently, the Company plans to conduct a conference call the next day at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to review the outcomes. Interested individuals can tune in to the live audio webcast of the call by accessing Events and Presentations within the Investor section on the Company’s website, investor.mt.com. METTLER TOLEDO (NYSE: MTD) stands as a prominent entity in this domain.

news.headline: System1, Inc. notified by NYSE for non-compliance due to average closing share price < $1.00 over consecutive 30 days.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, System1, Inc. (NYSE: SST) disclosed that the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) has raised concerns regarding its non-compliance with Section 802.01C of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. This was due to the average closing price of the Company’s Class A Common Stock falling below $1.00 for 30 consecutive trading days. The Company, known for its omnichannel customer acquisition marketing platform, received this notification. This development does not immediately affect the Company's listing status on the NYSE.

news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia, on January 10, 2025, a report has emerged that as wildfires rapidly spread due to strong winds, numerous neighborhoods in Los Angeles are being consumed. In response, Catholic Charities USA (CCUSA), representing the Catholic Church in the United States for domestic aid efforts, has initiated a specialized...

news.headline: Fed bank term funding loans $3.35b in the week ended January 8th after $4.41b.
Boqii Holding Limited changes ratio of ADS to Class A shares, from 1:15 to 1:25. NYSE American: BQ.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Boqii Holding Limited revealed plans to alter the ratio of its American Depositary Shares (ADSs) to Class A ordinary shares. The company, traded under the ticker symbol BQ on NYSE American, will change the ratio to 1 ADS representing 15 Class A ordinary shares. This adjustment aims to optimize the structure of Boqii's shares and enhance the trading process for investors.

news.headline: Aon (NYSE: AON) to release Q4 & full year 2024 earnings on Jan 31, 2025, at 5:00 am Central Time; CEO Greg Case to host conference call.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Dublin-based global professional services firm Aon plc (NYSE: AON) revealed its intention to unveil the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year on Friday, January 31, 2025. The official news release will be made public at 5:00 am Central Time. Greg Case, the Chief Executive Officer of Aon, is set to lead a conference in conjunction with the release to discuss the figures.

news.headline: Aon plc declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.675 per share on outstanding Class A Ordinary Shares, payable Feb 14, 2025.
news.summary: Dublin, on January 10, 2025 - Aon plc (NYSE: AON), a renowned professional services firm, disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.675 for each outstanding Class A Ordinary Share. This dividend is set to be paid on February 14, 2025, following the announcement by the Board of Directors.

news.headline: Raytech Holding reported a 31.0% increase in revenue to HKD 43.2 million (US$ 5.6 million) for the six months ended September 30, 2024. However, net income fell by 27.5% to HKD 4.7 million (US$ 0.6 million) due to rising operating expenses. Company aims to optimize costs while boosting sales growth.
news.summary: Raytech Holding Limited, a Hong Kong company specializing in personal care electrical appliances, reported a 31.0% increase in revenue to HKD 43.2 million for the six months ended September 30, 2024, up from HKD 33.0 million the previous year. Operating expenses rose sharply, with merchandise costs increasing by 40.3% to HKD 34.1 million and selling, general, and administrative expenses climbing to HKD 5.2 million. Income from operations decreased by 43.7% to HKD 3.9 million, and net income fell by 27.5% to HKD 4.7 million. Despite this, the company remains committed to improving profitability and market position by optimizing cost structures and driving sales growth. For more information, visit Raytech Holding Limited's website.

news.headline: byNordic Acquisition Corporation extends business combination deadline, depositing $40,312 for an additional month until Feb 12, 2025.
news.summary: Nordic Acquisition Corporation (NASDAQ: BYNO) disclosed depositing $40,312 into the Trust Account to extend the deadline for completing a business merger for an extra month, now set from January 12, 2025, to February 12, 2025. This is the sixth extension out of a possible twelve allowed under the August 8, 2024 amendment to the Company’s Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation. The amendment empowers the board to extend the termination date by one month each time, with the last possible extension being until August 12, 2025, or until the completion of the initial merger.

news.headline: REE Automotive will join 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference for 1-on-1 meetings with investors.
news.summary: The management team of the company will engage in individual meetings with institutional investors, private equity firms, and venture capital investors.

news.headline: Calidi Biotherapeutics closes $4.25M public offering of 5M shares at $0.85 each.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Calidi Biotherapeutics Inc. completed a public offering on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol CLDI. The company, which focuses on targeted antitumor virotherapies, sold 5,000,000 shares of common stock at $0.85 per share. This resulted in total gross proceeds of around $4.25 million from the offering.
